Homepage.metaTitle: TQC Co., Ltd. | Real Estate for Foreigners & Japan-Vietnam B2B Supply Chain
Homepage.metaDesc: TQC Co., Ltd. provides real estate brokerage for foreigners living in Japan, as well as Japan-Vietnam B2B supply chain establishment and purchasing agency services.

hero.slide1Sub: Total support for finding rental and properties for sale in Japan
hero.slide3Sub: Business matching and procurement agency with Vietnamese manufacturers

keibai.title3: Your First Step to Excellent Real Estate Investment
keibai.desc1: As a new option for real estate investment, TQC Co., Ltd. recommends our
keibai.desc3: which aggregates auction and public sale property information nationwide. From property information that can likely be acquired cheaper than market price to supporting complex legal procedures, we will guide your real estate investment to success.

kigyoulist.title3: From Sales List Creation to B2B Matching
kigyoulist.desc1: TQC Co., Ltd. strongly supports companies aiming to expand their business in the Japanese market. By utilizing our proprietary platform,
kigyoulist.desc3: we enable the automatic generation of highly accurate target lists and smooth B2B matching between Japanese and Vietnamese companies. We analyze massive amounts of corporate data to quickly find the best partner for your business.

akapla.title3: Strong Support for B2B Procurement in Vietnam
akapla.desc1: For companies aiming for cost reduction and diversification of production bases,
akapla.desc3: operated by TQC Co., Ltd., provides optimal solutions. We handle all processes as a one-stop service, from discovering excellent suppliers in Vietnam, quality control based on Japanese standards, to complex logistics and customs clearance procedures.

testimonials.title: Customer Reviews
testimonials.t1Text: Quick response, and my sudden move went smoothly. "I was looking for a property urgently due to a sudden transfer. The reply after inquiry was very fast, and it took no time from preview to contract. Thank you very much for flexibly responding to my difficult requests. Their support system is perfect, and they are a trustworthy real estate company."
testimonials.t2Text: I was able to safely entrust them with the biggest purchase of my life. "It was a big decision to purchase real estate, but thanks to T-homes' specialized knowledge and quick response, I was able to proceed with peace of mind. The deciding factor for my trust was that they honestly explained not only the merits of the property but also the points to note. I confidently recommend T-homes to anyone anxious about house hunting in Japan."
testimonials.t3Text: Quick response, and my sudden move went smoothly. "I was looking for a property urgently due to a sudden transfer. The reply after inquiry was very fast, and it took no time from preview to contract. Thank you very much for flexibly responding to my difficult requests. Their support system is perfect, and they are a trustworthy real estate company."

KigyoulistPage.desc: Utilizing overwhelming data volume and AI technology, we guide your business to the next stage, from new sales development to finding partners.
KigyoulistPage.p1: In modern business, high-quality information is the key to success. Strongly recommended by TQC Co., Ltd.,
KigyoulistPage.p1_after: is an innovative platform that centrally manages massive corporate data in Japan and allows instant searching and extraction.
KigyoulistPage.p2: It functions as a powerful tool to meet all B2B needs, from creating target lists for sales activities to discovering new business partners between Japan and Vietnam.
KigyoulistPage.v1Desc: Instantly narrow down target companies based on various conditions such as industry, size, and region.
KigyoulistPage.v2Desc: Generate lists for approaches with a single button. Drastically reduces the man-hours of the sales team.
KigyoulistPage.v3Desc: We support the establishment of supply chains between Japan and Vietnam and realize optimal partnerships.
KigyoulistPage.p3: While developing businesses such as "Japan-Vietnam B2B Supply Chain Establishment" and "Vietnamese HR Introduction", we at TQC Co., Ltd. strongly felt that approaches based on reliable data are essential to prevent mismatches between companies. Therefore, by utilizing Kigyoulist as a
KigyoulistPage.p3_after: , we are now able to provide highly accurate proposals and speedy matching to our client companies.
KigyoulistPage.boxDesc: If you are struggling with new customer acquisition or looking for reliable partners, please try Kigyoulist's powerful database.
KigyoulistPage.boxBtn: Try the automatic sales list creation tool

B2BSupplyPage.desc: TQC Co., Ltd. provides a strong B2B procurement network connecting Japan and Vietnam. Operated by us,
B2BSupplyPage.desc_after: supports everything from discovering optimal suppliers to logistics.
B2BSupplyPage.h2_1: The Optimal Solution for Cross-Border B2B Procurement
B2BSupplyPage.p1: The rapidly growing Vietnamese market is becoming an attractive procurement base for Japanese manufacturing and distribution industries. However, language barriers, differences in business customs, and the difficulty of quality control often become obstacles.
B2BSupplyPage.p2: Therefore, TQC Co., Ltd. has developed the
B2BSupplyPage.p2_after: by gathering our unique local network and know-how. This enables Japanese companies to confidently do business with excellent manufacturers in Vietnam.
B2BSupplyPage.servicesDesc: Why choose TQC. Professionals support every process from procurement to delivery.
B2BSupplyPage.s1Desc: We find high-quality manufacturing partners in Vietnam and negotiate optimal prices.
B2BSupplyPage.s2Desc: We implement a strict quality check system based on Japanese standards at local factories, minimizing the defect rate.
B2BSupplyPage.s3Desc: We handle everything from transportation from Vietnam to Japan to complex customs procedures.
B2BSupplyPage.s4Desc: We provide comprehensive consulting, including researching local market trends and avoiding contract troubles.
B2BSupplyPage.w1Desc: We cut out middlemen to enable direct procurement at Vietnamese factory prices.
B2BSupplyPage.w2Desc: Japanese staff visit local factories directly and inspect products based on strict standards.
B2BSupplyPage.w3Desc: We eliminate language barriers and achieve smooth communication with immediate responses.
B2BSupplyPage.ctaTitle: Want to solve your procurement issues?
B2BSupplyPage.ctaDesc: Leave purchasing, logistics, and finding partners in Vietnam to us.

KeibaiKoubaiPage.desc: TQC Co., Ltd. recommends utilizing the
KeibaiKoubaiPage.desc_after: where you can acquire real estate significantly cheaper than market prices. Start safe and secure real estate investment with professional support.
KeibaiKoubaiPage.h2_1: What are Auctioned and Public Sale Properties?
KeibaiKoubaiPage.p1: Auctioned (Keibai) and public sale (Koubai) properties are real estate forcibly sold by courts or administrative agencies due to unpaid mortgages or taxes. The biggest advantage is that you may be able to acquire properties at about 70% to 50% of the market price.
KeibaiKoubaiPage.p2: However, unlike normal real estate transactions, there are risks such as not being able to preview the interior and complex rights relationships. That's exactly why specialized platforms like our partner
KeibaiKoubaiPage.p2_after: and TQC's support are indispensable. With expert discernment and legal support, we minimize risks and achieve high yields.
KeibaiKoubaiPage.servicesDesc: We support the entire real estate investment process, from property search to follow-up after successful bids.
KeibaiKoubaiPage.s1Desc: We collect auction and public sale information nationwide with our proprietary system. We quickly deliver excellent properties that meet your conditions.
KeibaiKoubaiPage.s2Desc: Professionals handle complex procedures and document preparation at courts and administrative agencies on your behalf.
KeibaiKoubaiPage.s3Desc: We investigate rights troubles and hidden defects of properties in advance to realize safe transactions.
KeibaiKoubaiPage.s4Desc: We propose comprehensive investment plans, including post-bid renovation costs and yield calculations.
KeibaiKoubaiPage.w1Desc: We collect information from courts and government offices nationwide through proprietary routes and introduce near-unlisted excellent properties.
KeibaiKoubaiPage.w2Desc: In cooperation with experts, we clear complex rights relationships and occupant issues in advance.
KeibaiKoubaiPage.w3Desc: Multilingual staff provide full support for real estate investment by foreign nationals, from visa to legal aspects.
KeibaiKoubaiPage.ctaDesc: Check auction and public sale property information nationwide right now and find your ideal investment property.

THomesPage.title: T-HOMES Real Estate
THomesPage.p1_desc: In addition to the traditional criteria of 'rent, layout, and area' when choosing a rental property, we aim to add a new criterion: choosing by 'Management Company'. Thus, we have built a unique business model.
THomesPage.p2_desc: For those living in our managed properties, we provide events and campaigns to enjoy life, and finely distributed management bases to rush to you in case of trouble. We will continue to provide 'Residents First' services so that you will think 'I want to live in a property managed by TQC (T-Homes)'.
THomesPage.featuresTitle: Features of Our Real Estate Services
THomesPage.f1Desc: Full support from property search to contract in multiple languages, including Vietnamese.
THomesPage.f2Desc: Through our unique network, we carefully select properties where foreigners can easily pass the screening.
THomesPage.f3Desc: We respond promptly to troubles after moving in. You can live with peace of mind.
THomesPage.o1Desc: 'Thinking alongside the owner' Experience and track record of specializing in management since our founding.
THomesPage.o2Desc: We propose cost-effective renovations that only a management company can provide.
THomesPage.o3Desc: Please consult us for anything related to real estate trading, whether you want to sell, buy, invest, or earn income.
THomesPage.ot1Desc: Furniture and appliance rental systems in Osaka, Kyoto, Hyogo, Shiga, Tokyo, and Kanagawa.
THomesPage.ot2Desc: Make your room more comfortable. Organize your luggage with TQC (T-Homes)'s trunk room.
THomesPage.ot3Desc: A specialized desk supporting foreigners living in Japan. We also accept consultations from educational institutions.
